content.claim: 83.6% of a sample of 121 Hungarian primary school teachers reported an increase in students requiring developmental support, as of 2023.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: Sample size of 121 is small and non-representative of the national teacher population
This is perception data, not verified administrative count
Geographic and sectoral composition of respondent sample is not specified
Perception may reflect changed labeling thresholds rather than actual increase in underlying need
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
